creator: tino@goertemoeller.com
text:
gnomedb fails to compile
#gmake[2]: Entering directory '/usr/ports/databases/gnomedb/work/gnomedb-db-0.2.93/frontend
#gmake[2]: ***No rule to make target 'xinit.c', needed by 'all'. Stop.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/databases/gnomedb/ && make NO_CHECKSUM=YES install
